---
title: "The Rev. John Marriott"
---

## The Rev. John Marriott

**Dates:** (b.1808/9)

### Description

Vicar of St. John the Baptist, Hythe

### Biography

Husband of John Frewen Moor’s aunt, he married (Bradfield 1843) Elizabeth Stevens (b.1802/3), daughter of the Rev. Henry Stevens, Rector of Bradfield. Both were apparently dead by 1881?    [Moor, <i>Erminois</i>; 1861 census]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
